items.action: Add descriptions to all 20 spacing variables and 40 typography variables explaining when to use each value (TD-001). Reference the code theme documentation for source content.
items.value_framing: Without descriptions, an agent choosing between spacing values 1-6 has no semantic context. Every spacing decision requires manual specification, negating the token system's purpose.
items.projected_score_improvement: Dimension 1.6 from 25 to 50; removes one blocker

items.action:
Port one-line intent descriptions from MDX

tags to Figma COMPONENT_SET root entries. Replace code import snippets with functional intent descriptions on all component pages (CDC-001, IQ-001). The content already exists in code -- this is a copy operation.
items.value_framing: Agent cannot read component purpose from the Figma API. Every AI-assisted component selection requires manual specification. 96% of Figma descriptions carry zero decision-making value. The fix content already exists in code docs.
items.projected_score_improvement: Cluster 3 from 50.0 to 65+; removes two blockers. Largest single impact on overall score.

items.action: Create a parity gap register documenting the 7 known token value mismatches, 248 unmatched tokens, and structural differences (DPG-001). Classify each gap as intentional or requiring fix.
items.value_framing: 7 known mismatches and 248 unmatched tokens are undocumented. Each is a potential defect source. Agent-generated code silently uses wrong values for warning colours and typography.
items.projected_score_improvement: Dimension 6.6 from 0 to 50; removes one blocker; Cluster 6 from 62.5 to 70.8

items.action: Replace placeholder text in 14 of 17 sub-component documentation frames with real descriptions (DFM-002). Content can be derived from the code-side API docs and JSDoc descriptions.
items.value_framing: Agent reads placeholder text as real content and generates nonsensical usage guidance. Every AI-assisted query about sub-component purpose returns garbage.
items.projected_score_improvement: Dimension 3.5 from 50 to 75; Cluster 3 from 50.0 to 55.0

items.action: Implement deprecation markers in Figma using variable descriptions or naming convention (DEP-001). Mirror the code-side v9 breaking change list.
items.value_framing: Agent cannot distinguish current from deprecated components in Figma. AI-assisted implementations may reference components the team has decided to phase out in v9, creating rework.

items.action: Migrate elevation effect styles to Figma Variables when supported (TI-001).
items.value_framing: Elevation values live outside the variable system. Theme switches cannot propagate shadow changes automatically.

items.action: Formalize usage guidance into structured do/don't sections in the 10 most-used component docs (UG-001). Restructure existing prose guidance into machine-readable rules.
items.value_framing: Usage guidance exists as embedded prose. An agent must parse paragraphs to extract component selection rules. Structured rules enable direct lookup.

items.action: Create empty state patterns as reusable components or documented patterns (ES-001).
items.value_framing: Agent generates no empty state UI. Every data-dependent view ships without fallback patterns, requiring manual design for each instance.

items.action: Add motion duration and easing tokens to the Figma file, mirroring the code-side createTransitions values (MOT-001, MOT-002).
items.value_framing: Motion specifications exist only in code. Designers and agents working from Figma have no transition guidance, causing inconsistent animation implementations.

items.action: Build semantic and component token layers for spacing, typography, shape, and elevation. Extend the colour three-layer pattern to all categories (TA-001, AC-001).
items.value_framing: Every theme change requires manual updates across all components using flat spacing values. Without semantic layers, a brand refresh touches hundreds of hardcoded values instead of a single alias.

items.action: Bind component spacing properties to spacing variables instead of hardcoded px values (CTB-001). Follow the v9 pattern where hardcoded minWidth was replaced with theme.spacing.
items.value_framing: Spacing changes propagate manually in Figma, not through the token system. Every density or spacing scale adjustment requires editing every component individually.
items.projected_score_improvement: Dimension 2.1 from 50 to 75; Cluster 2 from 81.2 to 87.5
